examples.title: Algorithm: Linear Search
examples.description: Finding the location of a given element in a one-dimensional array
examples.code:
ALGORITHM LinearSearch
INPUT: array, target
OUTPUT: index of target if found, -1 otherwise

BEGIN
 FOR i FROM 0 TO array.length - 1
 IF array[i] == target THEN
 RETURN i
 END FOR
 RETURN -1
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step comparison of the target value with each element in the array
